title: An Explosion of AI Slop Is Pushing People Offline and Back into the Real World
abstract: Are you tired of the overwhelming surge of AI applications and chatbots that have taken over your digital life, making you crave a return to reality? "An Explosion of AI Slop" is here to help. Say goodbye to all those unnecessary AI tools that clutter up your online experience.
abstract_zh: 你是不是也觉得AI泛滥成灾？各种智能助手、聊天机器人让你眼花缭乱，结果反而想逃离数字世界，回归真实生活？这不，一个叫“An Explosion of AI Slop”的工具正帮你实现这一愿望。让我们一起告别那些冗余的AI应用吧！
